title: agrostis baetica
intro: Agrostis baetica, also known as the Betic bentgrass, is a type of grass species native to the Iberian Peninsula. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Agrostis baetica include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help soothe sore muscles and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Agrostis baetica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
